python sdk_smoke.py
stdout 'SDK_SMOKE_OK'

-- sdk_smoke.py --
import tinker
import os
import tarfile
from pathlib import Path
from urllib.parse import unquote, urlparse

import httpx
from tinker import ServiceClient


client = ServiceClient()
try:
    caps = client.get_server_capabilities()
    assert caps.supported_models, caps

    training = client.create_lora_training_client(
        base_model="Qwen/Qwen3-8B",
        rank=8,
    )
    info = training.get_info()
    assert info.model_id, info
    assert info.model_data.tokenizer_id == "Qwen/Qwen3-8B", info

    data = [
        tinker.Datum(
            model_input=tinker.ModelInput.from_ints([1, 1, 1, 1]),
            loss_fn_inputs={"target_tokens": [1, 1, 1, 1]},
        )
    ]
    before = training.forward(data, "cross_entropy").result(timeout=120).metrics["loss:mean"]
    backend_seen = False
    for _ in range(4):
        training.forward_backward(data, "cross_entropy").result(timeout=120)
        step = training.optim_step(tinker.AdamParams(learning_rate=1e-4)).result(timeout=120)
        backend_seen = backend_seen or step.metrics.get("optimizer_backend:mlx") == 1
    after = training.forward(data, "cross_entropy").result(timeout=120).metrics["loss:mean"]
    assert after < before, (before, after)
    assert backend_seen, "MLX optimizer backend was not reported"

    saved = training.save_state("sdk-smoke").result(timeout=120)
    assert saved.path.startswith("tinker://"), saved
    loaded = training.load_state(saved.path).result(timeout=120)
    assert loaded.path == saved.path, loaded
    with httpx.Client(base_url=os.environ["TINKER_BASE_URL"], timeout=120) as raw:
        resp = raw.post(
            "/api/v1/load_state_with_optimizer",
            json={"model_id": info.model_id, "path": saved.path},
        )
        resp.raise_for_status()
        future_id = resp.json()["request_id"]
        resp = raw.post("/api/v1/retrieve_future", json={"future_id": future_id})
        resp.raise_for_status()
        resumed = resp.json()
    assert resumed["path"] == saved.path, resumed
    assert resumed["optimizer_state"] is True, resumed

    sampler_saved = training.save_weights_for_sampler("sdk-smoke-sampler").result(timeout=120)
    sampler = training.create_sampling_client(sampler_saved.path)
    sample = sampler.sample(
        tinker.ModelInput.from_ints([1, 1, 1]),
        1,
        tinker.SamplingParams(max_tokens=1, temperature=0),
    ).result(timeout=120)
    assert len(sample.sequences) == 1 and len(sample.sequences[0].tokens) == 1, sample
    seq = sample.sequences[0]
    assert len(seq.logprobs) == len(seq.tokens), sample
    with httpx.Client(base_url=os.environ["TINKER_BASE_URL"], timeout=120) as raw:
        req = {
            "model_path": sampler_saved.path,
            "num_samples": 1,
            "prompt": {"chunks": [{"type": "encoded_text", "tokens": [1, 1, 1]}]},
            "sampling_params": {"max_tokens": 1, "temperature": 0, "seed": 7, "prompt_logprobs": True},
        }
        first = raw.post("/api/v1/asample", json=req)
        first.raise_for_status()
        first_future = first.json()["request_id"]
        first = raw.post("/api/v1/retrieve_future", json={"future_id": first_future})
        first.raise_for_status()
        first = first.json()
        second = raw.post("/api/v1/asample", json=req)
        second.raise_for_status()
        second_future = second.json()["request_id"]
        second = raw.post("/api/v1/retrieve_future", json={"future_id": second_future})
        second.raise_for_status()
        second = second.json()
    assert first["sequences"][0]["tokens"] == second["sequences"][0]["tokens"], (first, second)
    assert len(first["sequences"][0]["logprobs"]) == len(first["sequences"][0]["tokens"]), first
    assert len(first["prompt_logprobs"]) == 3, first

    rest = client.create_rest_client()
    weights_info = rest.get_weights_info_by_tinker_path(saved.path).result(timeout=120)
    assert weights_info.base_model == "Qwen/Qwen3-8B", weights_info
    runs = rest.list_training_runs(limit=10).result(timeout=120)
    assert any(run.training_run_id == info.model_id for run in runs.training_runs), runs
    checkpoints = rest.list_checkpoints(info.model_id).result(timeout=120)
    assert any(c.tinker_path == saved.path for c in checkpoints.checkpoints), checkpoints
    user_checkpoints = rest.list_user_checkpoints(limit=10).result(timeout=120)
    assert any(c.tinker_path == saved.path for c in user_checkpoints.checkpoints), user_checkpoints
    archive = rest.get_checkpoint_archive_url_from_tinker_path(saved.path).result(timeout=120)
    assert archive.url.startswith("file://"), archive
    archive_path = Path(unquote(urlparse(archive.url).path))
    assert archive_path.is_file(), archive
    with tarfile.open(archive_path) as tf:
        names = set(tf.getnames())
    assert "adapters.safetensors" in names, names
    assert "checkpoint.json" in names, names
    assert "optimizer_state.json" in names, names
    assert "complete" in names, names
    rest.publish_checkpoint_from_tinker_path(saved.path).result(timeout=120)
    rest.unpublish_checkpoint_from_tinker_path(saved.path).result(timeout=120)
    rest.set_checkpoint_ttl_from_tinker_path(saved.path, 3600).result(timeout=120)

    delete_me = training.save_state("sdk-smoke-delete").result(timeout=120)
    rest.delete_checkpoint_from_tinker_path(delete_me.path).result(timeout=120)
    checkpoints = rest.list_checkpoints(info.model_id).result(timeout=120)
    assert all(c.tinker_path != delete_me.path for c in checkpoints.checkpoints), checkpoints

    print("SDK_SMOKE_OK", info.model_id, before, after, saved.path, sampler_saved.path)
finally:
    client.holder.close()
